Best-effort OpenAPI 3.1 description of the USDA Foreign Agricultural
Service (FAS) Open Data Services, derived from the public Swagger 2.0
document at https://apps.fas.usda.gov/opendata/swagger/docs/v1 and the
OpendataWeb portal at https://apps.fas.usda.gov/opendataweb/home.
The API exposes three datasets:
  - ESR: U.S. weekly Export Sales of Agricultural Commodity Data
  - GATS: Global Agricultural Trade System (Census and UN Trade)
  - PSD: Production, Supply and Distribution
Authentication uses an `API_KEY` header issued via api.data.gov.


Contact Support:
 Name: USDA Foreign Agricultural Service
